5.name: Hawaii Five Oh @ Vinery Stud Handicap

1.comments: $260,000 yearling purchase. Sire a son of Deep Impact that won the G1 Yasuda Kinen 1600m as a six year-old. Dam won two races in NZ. Looked in control winning 0.7L at Hawkesbury 2Y-Bt 24/2.

$1.2 million dollar yearling. Sire continues to produce quality gallopers including 2025 VRC Toorak Hcp winner Transatlantic. Dam 3-time Group 2 winner. Got the bob in 0.1L at Randwick 2Yf-Bt 5/3. Blue blood filly undefeated in two trials.

Not offered Sales. Sire has already produced Group 1 winners Zapateo  and Another Prophet. Dam a half to stakes winners Encryption and Emanate. Showing good signs when runner-up 2.8L at Warwick Farm 2Y-Bt 2/3.

Not offered Sales. By sire with great potential having already produced dual G1 winning Champion 2yo Fireburn from his first crops of foals. Dam won three races up to 1300m. Got the bob in on the line 0.2L at  Randwick 2Y-Bt 5/3.
Just off the speed, no run 400m, kept trying 1.7L Gimcrack Group 3. Held third 1.5L at Canterbury Park. She should find this race easier than her previous first-up assignment.

$725,000 purchase. Snitzel is a 4-time Champion Sire of Australia & 4-time Champion Sire of 2YOs. Dam a speedster that won the G2 1000m Caulfield Sprint. Big margin but game second 4.1L at Rosehill Gardens 2Yf-Bt 23/2.

$145,000 purchase. Sire a son of I Am Invincible that was an explosive sprinter winning the G1 William Reid in near track record time. Dam won three races up to 1100m. Soft victory 2.8L at Warwick Farm 2Y-Bt 2/3.
Encouraging work out for second 1.2L at Royal Randwick 2Y-Bt 19thFeb2026 over 740m Soft 5. Made up some ground when the race was over into fifth 2L at Canterbury Park 2Y Mdn over 1100m Soft 6.

2.comments: Back and wide, didn't run on, lame post race 8.7L Golden Gift Group 3 over 1100m. Ran away with a soft win 1.3L at Warwick Farm 2Yc&G-Bt 2/3 820m. $2.8 million dollar yearling. Excuses on debut. Nice recent trial win.

$300,000 purchase. By sire on the rise having already produced G1 AJC Champagne winner Broadsiding in his first crop foals. Dam a half to stakes placed Condor. Got the bob in on the line winning 0.2L at Scone 2Y-Bt 25/2.

Not offered Sales. Sire reigning 2024-25 Champion Australian Sire with 185 individual winners, 17 at stakes level. Dam a Group 3 winner that has already produced star sprinter September Run. Held third 1.3L at Warwick Farm 2Yc&G-Bt 2/3.

Not offered Sales. Sire winner of almost $2.5 million dollars in prize money. Dam won six races up to 1700m. Looked in control winning 0.7L Randwick 2Y-Bt 5/3. Plenty of early speed. Drawn to use it on debut.

Passed in $475,000 at Sales. Sire's best progeny include Sunlight, Joliestar and Ozzmosis. Dam a dual stakes winning juvenile. Very comfortable win 1.2L at Warwick Farm 2Y-Bt 2/3. Undefeated in 3 trials. Very nice type.

Not offered Sales. Top effort when narrowly missed second 0L at Warwick Farm 2Y- Bt 16thFeb2026 over 792m Soft 5. One-paced to the line and always well back 10.2L Skyline Group 2 over 1200m Soft 6. Set tough ask on debut. Much easier here.

$350,000 yearling. Had few excuses 9.2L at Wyong MM 2Y Listed 1100m. Dam won the G1 Sangster Stakes and has produced juvenile G3 winner Bel Merci. Held third 1.7L at Randwick 2Yc&G-Bt 5/3. Big drop in grade for this.

$120,000 yearling purchase. Sire a son of Snitzel out of a G2 winning mare. His career was highlighted when winning the G1 Moir Stakes. Dam a winner at 1100m. Did a good job to hold onto third 2.9L at Warwick Farm 2Yc&G-Bt 2/3.

$180,000 yearling. Sire winner of the Group 1 Golden Slipper. He is the sire of 2025 G1 The Goodwood Handicap winner Reserve Bank. Dam a Listed winner over 1350m. Well beaten seventh 7.3L at Rosehill Gardens 2Yc&G-Bt 23/2.

3.comments: Fought hard to hold fourth position with the leaders but was no match 4.3L at Warwick Farm Super 3Y Mdn-Sw over 1200m Soft 5. Running on well into fourth from midfield in a grinding effort 1.4L at Rosehill Gardens F&M Mdn-Sw over 1200m.

Flew to the line in an impressive gallop for second but got too far back 0.1L at Gosford Mdn-Sw over 1200m. Raced worse than midfield and labored to make up enough ground sixth 3.8L at Canterbury Park Mdn-Sw over 1250m.

Positioned to threaten however no match for the first two when third 2.3L at Gosford Super 3Y Mdn over 1100m. No match for the winner but fought on boldly for third 1.3L at Rosehill F&M Mdn-Sw over 1200m. Consistent and should be hard fit.

Got back worse than midfield and was pushed along to make ground 5L at Kembla Grange F&M Mdn over 1500m. Weakened out of the race after doing a lot of chasing 8.6L at Rosehill Super 3Y+Mdn-Sw over 1400m. Should be ready to fire fresh.

Sat behind speed, travelled keenly, had his chance 4.5L Call-Pres Group 2 over 1600m. Poised to bounce at the 400m however didn't have a lot left to give 4.3L at Canterbury Park Mdn-Sw over 1250m. Second-up.
Fifth 6.4L at Rosehill Gardens 3Y+ Mdn-Bt 12thFeb2026 over 900m. Tried very hard under vigorous riding from midfield but outclassed sixth 10.5L at Rosehill Gardens Cg&E Mdn-Sw over 1200m.

Ran on well and looked a winning chance but was edged out into third spot 1.6L at Wyong Cg&E Mdn over 1100m. Found one better over the concluding stages after going forward 1L at Rosehill Cg&E Mdn-Sw over 1200m. Not far away all prep.

Sire won the stallion making Group 1 Coolmore Stud Stakes 1200m beating a stellar crop of colts including Extreme Choice, Astern, Russian Revolution and Star Turn. Had two lead up trials and should be fit first-up.

4.comments: Same sire as 2025 G1 ATC Derby winner Aeliana. Got the bob in on the line winning 0.3L at Hawkesbury 3Y Mdn-Bt 24thFeb2026 over 800m. Good recent trial win and the stable always has their horses fit on debut.

Sire a son of Pierro out of a stakes winning mare. Pushed along to make ground for second 2.4L at Royal Randwick 3Y+ Mdn-Bt 19thFeb2026 over 1050m Soft 5. In front of a subsequent winner at a recent trial.

By Champion Australian Sire whose progeny include 2024 Group 1 Caulfield Guineas winner Private Life. Very smart win 4.9L at Hawkesbury Mdn-Bt 24thFeb2026 over 1000m. Winning his trials but huge margins and expect a big debut run.

Had a big task ahead settling well back in the running 4.2L at Rosehill Gardens 3Y Mdn over 1200m. Tenacious run after going forward in transit and nice effort to hold third 1.7L at Newcastle F&M Mdn over 1250m Soft 5.
Sire continues to produce top class progeny the likes of glamour mare and 2025 G1 Manikato Stakes winner Charm Stone. Held third 1.9L at Royal Randwick 3Y+ Mdn-Bt 19thFeb2026 over 1050m Soft 5.
Sire arguably the pre-eminent stallion in Australia after being crowned Australian Champion Sire 2024-25. Sixth 3.7L at Rosehill Gardens 3Y+ Mdn-Bt 12thFeb2026 over 900m.

By sire with great potential having already produced dual G1 winning Champion 2yo Fireburn and G3 winner Subterranean from his first two small crops of foals. Fifth 3.4L at Warwick Farm 3Y+ Mdn-Bt 2ndMar2026 over 817m Soft 6.
Did pass a few tired horses but ultimately left run too late 5.6L at Bathurst Mdn-Sw over 1100m Soft 5. Just missed when finished a close second 1L at Hawkesbury 3Y Mdn-Bt 24thFeb2026 over 800m.
Sire a consistent and versatile producer of top class horses including superstar mare Via Sistina. Got the bob in on the line winning 0.2L at Warwick Farm 3Y+ Mdn-Bt 2ndMar2026 over 817m Soft 6.

By impressive shuttle sire that has already produced Group 1 winners Tom Kitten, War Machine and Private Harry. Game performance for third despite the margin 2.8L at Rosehill Gardens 3Y+ Mdn-Bt 23rdFeb2026 over 900m.

Under pressure in the lead and had to pull out all stops to hold sixth 2.5L at Kembla Grange Mid Mdn-Sw over 1000m. Got back worse than midfield and was pushed along to make ground 8.2L at Kensington 3Yc&G Mdn over 1300m.

5.comments: Sat behind the speed and narrowly failed to make up the ground holding second 0L at Kensington 5Y+ Bm72 over 1400m Soft 7. Held position strongly to the line but was never a serious threat 2.1L at Rosehill Gardens Bm72 over 1400m.

Had the right run on the pace and made it count to win narrowly 0.2L at Sandown Hillside Bm78 over 2400m Soft 5. Came from midfield to run on nicely into third 1.9L at Sandown Hillside Bm78 over 2400m. Respect first-up but may need further.

Weakened in the straight and always had an uphill battle to challenge 7.8L at Leopardstown 3Y Hcp over 1810m. Soft winner racing away from rivals 1.8L at Naas Hcp over 2112m. Ex European at his local debut. Keep safe.

Never a threat after showing no early speed from the barriers 22.2L at Rosehill Gardens Bm78 over 2400m Soft 5. Ran home ok into fifth but was never a winning hope after getting back 3.3L at Warwick Farm Cg&E Bm72 over 1400m. Needs further.
Under pressure to make ground from settling position 24.7L at Sapphire Coast Bega Cup Bm94 over 1600m Soft 6. Loomed as a threat but content with fourth 1.3L at Kembla Grange 5Y+ Bm64 over 1500m.

Edged out rivals to win after sitting on pace 0.3L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 2200m. Too far back in the running to be a serious threat 22.5L at Royal Randwick Bm78 over 2000m Soft 7. Likes this venue and can handle all going.

Settled behind the leaders and few excuses fighting on for fifth 6L at Royal Randwick Bm78 over 1400m. Ran out of energy after leading and giving followers a great sight 2.2L Guy Walter Group 2 over 1400m Soft 6. Likely to benefit from the drop in grade.

No match for rivals and was always out the back chasing 10.3L at Caulfield Bm84 over 1400m. Stalked the speed, under the whip to make ground struggling into fifth 4.6L at Sandown Hillside Cg&E Bm74 over 1400m Soft 5. Unbeaten second-up.

No match for rivals and was always out the back chasing 7.6L at Rosehill Gardens Bm78 over 1800m Heavy 8. Had to dig deep but made up ground well to win 0.5L at Rosehill Gardens Bm78 over 2000m Soft 5. Looks well placed resuming.

Failed to improve on the front runners after settling midfield 5.3L at Ballarat Bm84 over 2000m Soft 6. Settled midfield and tried gallantly to make ground 1.6L at Canterbury Park Estar-Bm78 over 1550m. Second-up.

Beaten convincingly by rivals when never looked a serious threat 8.3L at Royal Randwick 3&4Y Bm72 over 1400m. Made up some ground into fourth after settling behind the speed 4.1L at Royal Randwick 3&4Y Bm78 over 1600m.

Fought hard over the final stages to hold third after sitting behind leaders 0.1L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 2110m. Always doing the chasing after displaying no early speed 14.8L at Canterbury Park Bm72 over 1550m. Can improve second-up.

6.comments: Won after sitting on the pace and getting the advantage late 0.1L at Hawkesbury Cl1 over 1100m. Gallant effort to hold on for a win after sitting with the leaders in-running 0.5L at Hawkesbury F&M Bm64 over 1100m. Hard to beat.

Won by the barest of margins after sitting off the pace 0.1L at Canterbury Park 3Yf Mdn over 1100m. Settled a long way back but showed best work late for a fast finishing third 0.9L Mode Plate Listed over 1200m. Likely to benefit from the drop in grade.

Caught the eye storming home for second from back in the field 1L at Warwick Farm F&M Bm72 over 1100m. No match for the winner but did make up late ground into fourth 2.6L at Wyong Bm64 over 1000m Soft 5. Second-up.

Desperately close finish when photo could have gone either way, third 0.2L at Wyong Cl1 over 1100m. Held spot to the line for fifth and never a winning chance 4.2L at Hawkesbury Cl1 over 1000m. Second-up.

Sat behind the leaders and battled the race out nicely for fourth 3.7L at Sportsbet Sandown Hillside Bm64 over 1300m. Had few excuses after finding a nice trail midfield 5.4L at Canterbury Park 5Y+ Bm72 over 1100m. Second-up.

Held position to the line for third 1L at Canterbury Park Mares Bm72 over 1100m. Tenacious run after going forward in transit and nice effort to hold third 2L at Canterbury Park F&M Bm72 over 1200m Soft 6. Keep safe.
Midfield on rail, tried to run on didn't find much 5.7L Tea Rose Group 2 over 1400m. Sat behind the leaders and fought hard over the final stages for third 4.7L at Goulburn Cl1 over 1400m. Threat.

Ran on ok for fifth after settling midfield in transit 2.3L at Muswellbrook Sizzler Bm82 over 1000m Soft 5. Tenacious run after going forward in transit and nice effort to hold third 1.6L at Port Macquarie Mnc Champ over 1200m.

Beaten convincingly by rivals when never looked a serious threat 3.2L at Warwick Farm Mares Bm72 over 1100m. Made up some ground when the race was over into fifth 1.6L at Canterbury Park Mares Bm72 over 1100m.

Displayed best work once the race was already won, fifth 1.9L at Canterbury Park 3Y+ Bm72 over 1100m. Got back in the running and did a great job to get so close 2.6L at Royal Randwick Midway Bm72(71) over 1100m Soft 6. Proven here at this track/distance.

7.comments: Positioned ready to pounce and took over late for an easy win 1.4L at Canterbury Park 5Y+ Bm72 over 1250m. Tracked into the race well from a forward position but was no match sixth 2.8L at Warwick Farm 5Y+ Bm72 over 1400m. Flies fresh.

Cast wide no cover, never given a hope 5.2L Springtime Stak Listed over 1400m Soft 5. Sat behind the leaders and battled the race out nicely for fourth 5.3L Spring Stk Group 3 over 1600m. Likely to benefit from the drop in grade.
Came from midfield to run on nicely into third 1.5L at Caulfield Bm84 over 1100m. Sent forward and gave backers a sight before weakening into fifth 1.7L at Rosehill Gardens 3&4Y Bm78 over 1100m.

Midfield with the leaders in sight however only held that ground to line 2.5L at Randwick Bm78 over 1200m. Went forward to contend for the lead and held on well for second 0.8L at Rosehill Gardens 3&4Y Bm78 over 1100m. Top pick.

Enjoyed a nice run on the pace and raced clear to victory 1.1L at Royal Randwick Midway Bm72 over 1400m Heavy 9. Raced up on the pace but capitulated when the pressure was on 5.6L Gunsynd Group 3 over 1600m. Can win first-up.

Big effort to finish the race off well for third after getting back in-running 2L Gold Edition Listed over 1200m. Tracked into the race just behind the pace and did little when it mattered 3.2L at Aquis Park Gold Coast Mm 3Y Guineas Restricted Listed over 1400m.

Never in the hunt but last half of the race was best 4.5L at Royal Randwick Cg&E Bm78 over 1200m. Settled behind the pace and ran home gamely for second 0.4L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 1200m. Main danger.

Raced up on the pace but capitulated when the pressure was on 5.2L at Canterbury Park 3Y+ Bm72 over 1100m. Sat with the leader but when let go there was nothing left sixth 4.5L at Canterbury Park Bm78 Final over 1100m Soft 6. Has a history of running well at this track/distance.

Determined win after sitting close to the lead in transit 0.2L at Canterbury Park 5Y+ Bm72 over 1100m Soft 5. Looked a chance after leading but weakened late for fourth 1.6L at Canterbury Park Estar-Bm78 over 1250m.

Determined win after sitting close to the lead in transit 0L at Hawkesbury Cl1 over 1100m. Sat on the pace over the final 400m and gained upper hand to win 0.5L at Hawkesbury F&M Bm64 over 1100m. Respect.

8.comments: No match for the winner but did make up late ground into fourth 2.1L at Rosehill Gardens Bm78 over 1350m. Looked in need of further after getting a long way out of ground, sixth 3.3L at Royal Randwick Bm88 over 1200m Soft 5. Down in grade here so don't dismiss.

Allowed every opportunity to win after sitting with the leader but faded into third 0.8L at Royal Randwick Bm78 over 1200m. Led, tried hard but was ultimately outclassed into third placing 2.1L at Rosehill Gardens Bm78 over 1300m. Down in grade here so don't dismiss.

Got going when the race was won but encouraging nonetheless, fifth 1.8L at Canterbury Park Estar-Bm78 over 1250m. Nicely positioned midfield and produced a courageous effort fifth in a blanket finish 1L at Canterbury Park Bm72 over 1250m Soft 6.

Midfield smother, nice cart in, had chance 1.4L Springtime Stak Listed over 1400m Soft 5. Tracked into the race well from a forward position but was no match sixth 2.6L at Rosehill Gardens Bm72 over 1400m. Second-up.

Back half, well beaten, trainer to spell 4L Exford Plate Listed over 1400m. Couldn't quicken when asked for the effort after positioning worse than midfield 5.3L at Warwick Farm Cg&E Bm72 over 1400m. Second-up.

Hardly sighted until very late gaining sixth 5.4L at Warwick Farm Bm88 over 1600m. Ridden positively but didn't run on in the straight for fifth 10.6L at Rosehill Gardens Bm88 over 1800m Heavy 8. Down in grade here so don't dismiss.
Made no headway on the leaders when sixth after sitting midfield 7.6L at Hawkesbury Cl1 over 1300m. Led and kicked clear for nice win 1.1L at Canberra Guinprev over 1400m. Second-up.

Poised to bounce at the 400m however couldn't brdige the gap 2.8L at Rosehill Gardens 3&4Y Bm72 over 1400m. Midfield with the leaders in sight however had little to show in the finish 7.9L at Rosehill Gardens Bm78 over 1300m. Has won second-up previously.

One-paced to the line and always well back 42.7L at Royal Randwick Ctry Champ over 1400m Soft 5. Applied pressure to the leader but had nothing left at the finish, fifth 2.4L at Mudgee Cdra Champ over 1400m Soft 5. Second-up winner, rates highly.

Hit the front trying to fight off challengers but was no match sixth 4.8L at Canterbury Park 5Y+ Bm72 over 1200m. Never in contention after settling a long way back 5.7L at Canterbury Park 5Y+ Bm72 over 1100m. Won second-up in the past.

Held down sixth position after settling there throughout 4.2L at Caulfield Bm84 over 1400m. Made no headway on the leaders when sixth after sitting midfield 4L at Caulfield Bm84 over 1400m. Like chances back to this level.
Dead-Heated for first with the judge failing to find a margin 1.7L at Gosford Cl1 over 1200m. Edged out rivals to win narrowly 0.2L at Kembla Grange Cond Bm68 over 1300m. Right in this.
No match for the winner but fought on boldly to hold third 1.3L at Canterbury Park 3&4Y Bm68 over 1550m. Led and kicked clear for nice win 1.7L at Warwick Farm Cg&E Bm72 over 1400m. Keep safe.

Pounced on the lead on the line but just lost when second 0L at Kensington 5Y+ Bm72 over 1400m Soft 7. Held position strongly to the line but was never a serious threat 2.1L at Rosehill Gardens Bm72 over 1400m.
Had a big task ahead settling well back in the running 4.5L at Royal Randwick Cg&E Bm78 over 1200m. Settled behind the pace and ran home gamely for second 0.4L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 1200m.
Pushed along by rider but had nothing left to give 3.4L at Royal Randwick Mdn-Bt 27thJan2026 over 1050m. Led and kicked clear for nice win 1.2L at Warwick Farm Super 3Y Mdn over 1400m. On the up.
